payload.text: Run the daily GEO citation audit. Load the `geo-llmseo-playbook` skill and follow it end to end: read the target domain and keywords from MEMORY.md (## Target, ## Keywords), query ChatGPT / Gemini / Perplexity for each keyword, score citation share, file the full table to wiki/Knowledge/GEO/Audits/YYYY-MM-DD.md, update wiki/Knowledge/GEO/citation-share.md, then post a three-line delta to Slack. If citation share moved on no keyword and nothing else changed, post a single line saying so. If the audit cannot run at all (no domain or keywords set), reply with the single literal token `NO_REPLY` and nothing else — that is OpenClaw's silent-turn sentinel.
